property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Tilt (Mouse Y) | Camera" Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up/down while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Pan (Mouse X) | Camera" Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left/right while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-B4 "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-B4 "Modifier | Modifier" Pop mode stack -- return to the prior active mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-B3.hold Clean 100ms tap on the light-amp slot. Activation-mode must stay release (not both).

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-B4 "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap requests / toggles docking (the same as a normal press). Hold about half a second to send a quick Right Alt+N chord -- Star Citizen's dock/undock toggle, which can't be bound to a stick button directly.

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-H2.down.hold "Dock/Undock | Flight Control" Quick Right Alt+N chord -- SC docking toggle

property.name: action-label
property.value: T-H1.press-in.hold "Reset Freelook | Camera" Holds F4 + the freelook button 0.5s to recenter.

property.name: description
property.value: Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up and down in 3rd-person flight. The flat center curve suppresses idle stick drift so the camera holds still.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Axis to Mouse Axis (3rd Person Freelook)

property.name: description
property.value: Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left and right in 3rd-person flight. The flat center curve suppresses idle stick drift so the camera holds still.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Axis to Mouse Axis (3rd Person Freelook)

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: The mini-stick reads as four buttons - push it past halfway to cycle targets: hostiles by default, everything on a double-tap. Click it in to lock the target under your reticle.

property.name: description
property.value: The mini-stick reads as four buttons - push it past halfway to cycle targets: hostiles by default, everything on a double-tap. Click it in to lock the target under your reticle.

property.name: description
property.value: Pulling the Aeromax brake lever nearly all the way (past 95%) presses and holds the space brake. Release to let go.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: Flipping the trigger guard down toggles missile operator mode. Flipping it back up exits to guns - a release macro taps the guns-mode toggle. Pull the exposed trigger to fire missiles.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: Hold the Modifier button (T-B4) to switch on the Modifier layer, a temporary shift that gives most buttons a second function while held. Release to return. Nothing is sent to the game; it only changes Joystick Gremlin's layer.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap fires a radar ping. Hold about half a second to toggle Light Amplification (night vision); it runs through a macro because Star Citizen only accepts a quick tap on that bind.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap resets the current view. Hold about half a second to recenter the camera: a macro holds F4 plus the freelook button for half a second, since Star Citizen won't let you bind the recenter directly.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap cycles your operator mode. Hold about half a second to swap master modes between SCM and NAV; Joystick Gremlin's active layer follows along.

property.name: description
property.value: Hold about half a second to cycle the Auxiliary layer for mining and salvage - Star Citizen's operator mode and Joystick Gremlin's layer switch together. From Auxiliary, the hold returns to SCM.
